Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in cases that later lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in variants that do not involve a PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Total time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION compared to the total time for Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER across all variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in successful variants (ending in Payment Handled) versus rejected variants involving Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants where no rejection occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average waiting time to Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION when the case originates from a previously rejected submission by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Time of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in variants that skip the BUDGET OWNER approval step
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER does not occur

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in cases that eventually reach Payment Handled without any rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in variants that include a PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Request Payment in variants that avoid rejections entirely
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in cases that loop back due to prior rejections by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in multi-approval variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Time until Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION is performed in cases that later experience Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION compared to the average time for Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in shared process paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case
